jobs.ai_title: HSSC CET Group D Exam 2026 Apply Online
jobs.ai_meta_description: Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC) has released notification for Group D Common Eligibility Test (CET) 2026. Apply online till 03/07/2026. Read details and apply now!
jobs.ai_overview: Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC) ne Group D posts ke liye Common Eligibility Test (CET) ka notification jaari kiya hai. Yeh recruitment Haryana mein sarkari naukri ka ek accha mauka hai. Jo bhi candidates 10th pass hain aur Haryana mein government job karna chahte hain, ve iske liye apply kar sakte hain. Application process 19 June 2026 se shuru ho gayi hai aur candidates 03 July 2026 tak online apply kar sakte hain. Fee payment ke liye last date 06 July 2026 hai. Is test ke through Group D categories mein vacancies fill ki jayengi. Age limit 18 se 42 saal ke beech honi chahiye, jo ki 03 July 2026 ko calculate ki jayegi. Candidates ko Matriculation level par Hindi ya Sanskrit compulsory subject ke roop mein padha hona chahiye. Yeh ek umaida bhara avsar hai jo candidates ko Haryana sarkar mein sthan pane mein madad karega. Aage ki jaankari ke liye official notification zaroor dekhein.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: HSSC CET Group D exam Haryana mein Group D recruitments ke liye ek crucial step hai. Yeh test state government ke liye ek large pool of eligible candidates select karne ka ek streamlined tarika hai. Ismein 10th pass candidates ko mauka milta hai, jo ki bahut bada section hai job seekers ka. Application dates ko dhyan mein rakhte hue, candidates ko jaldi se jaldi apply karna chahiye. Fee structure different categories ke liye alag alag hai, jise candidates notification mein check kar sakte hain. Eligibility criteria simple hai, bas 10th pass hona aur Hindi/Sanskrit ek subject ke roop mein hona zaroori hai. Age limit bhi reasonable rakhi gayi hai. Ye recruitment state ke development mein contribute karne wale talented individuals ko hire karne ka ek accha platform hai. Candidates ko is mauke ka pura fayda uthana chahiye.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aapne 10th class pass kar li hai aur Haryana mein sarkari naukri karne ka sapna dekhte hain, toh yeh vacancy aapke liye hai. Specialy ve yuva jo Haryana mein rehne wale hain aur government sector mein apna career banana chahte hain, unhe yeh mauka nahi gavana chahiye. Agar aapki age 18 se 42 saal ke beech hai (03/07/2026 tak) aur aapne Matric mein Hindi ya Sanskrit padha hai, toh aap eligibility criteria meet karte hain. Yeh un sabhi ke liye ek bright opportunity hai jo sthir aur sammanjanak sarkari naukri ki talaash mein hain.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: HSSC CET Group D exam ki taiyari ke liye, sabse pehle syllabus ko samajhein. Previous year papers ko solve karke exam pattern aur important topics ka idea lagayein. General Awareness, Reasoning, Maths, aur Hindi/English jaise subjects par focus karein. Haryana GK ko bhi importance dein kyunki yeh state level exam hai. Regular revision aur mock tests aapki speed aur accuracy improve karne mein madad karenge. Study material ke liye official notification mein diye gaye resources ko follow karein aur online mock test series bhi join kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: HSSC CET Group D recruitment ke tahat pay scale aur salary details official notification mein available hain. Aam taur par, Group D posts ke liye sarkari vetanmaan kendra ya rajya sarkaar ke pay commission ke anusar hota hai. Iske alawa, employees ko mahine ka vetan, plus government rules ke hisab se bhatte (allowances) bhi milte hain. Precise salary structure aur usse judi anya jaankari ke liye, sabhi candidates ko HSSC dwara jaari ki gayi vistrit suchna padhne ki salah di jaati hai.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Group D posts mein vibhinn prakar ke administrative aur supporting roles shamil hote hain. Yeh post sarkari karyalayon mein kaam ko sudharne mein madad karti hai. Kaam ki prakriti nibandhanusar hoti hai, jaise ki office assistant, mali, safai karamchari, ya chowkidar adi. Yeh ek entry-level position hai jo candidates ko sarkari seva mein shuruat karne ka avsar pradan karti hai. Duty mein sarkari niyam aur prakriyaon ka palan karna shamil hai. Yeh naukri ek sthir career path pradan karti hai.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: HSSC CET Group D ke liye selection process mein pahle Common Eligibility Test (CET) hoga. Iske baad, candidates ki merit list taiyar ki jayegi. Merit list CET mein prapt ank ke aadhar par banayi jayegi. Jo candidates is test mein achha perform karenge, unhein Group D posts ke liye consider kiya jayega. Kabhi-kabhi document verification bhi hota hai. Isliye, candidates ko CET mein acche score lane par poora dhyan dena chahiye. Strategy mein syllabus ke har section ko cover karna aur acche se practice karna shamil hai.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC) dwara Group D Common Eligibility Test (CET) ke liye online apply karne ke liye, sabse pehle HSSC ki official website visit karein ya diye gaye 'Apply Online' link par click karein. Registration process poori karne ke baad, aapko application form bharna hoga jismein apni personal details, educational qualifications, aur anya required information sahi-sahi bharni hogi. Form submit karne se pehle, sabhi details ko ek baar dhyan se check kar lein. Application fee ka bhugtan online mode se karna hoga. Final submission ke baad, application form ka printout zaroor lein aur use apne paas surakshit rakhein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: HSSC CET Group D ke liye eligibility kya hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Jo candidates ne matriculation (10th class) exam pass kiya hai aur jinke paas Hindi ya Sanskrit mein se koi ek subject Matric level par raha hai, ve apply kar sakte hain. Minimum age 18 saal aur maximum 42 saal honi chahiye, jo ki 03 July 2026 ko consider ki jayegi.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Application fee kitni hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: General category aur anya rajyon ke general category ke liye application fee 500 rupees hai. Haryana ke reserved categories (SC/BC/EWS) ke liye fee 250 rupees hai. Agar koi candidate Aadhaar number nahi deta hai toh uske liye fee 1000 rupees hogi.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Apply karne ki last date kya hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Online application form submit karne ki last date 03 July 2026 hai. Fee payment ki last date 06 July 2026 hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main form mein koi correction kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, agar form bharte samay koi galti ho gayi hai, toh aap 07 July se 09 July 2026 ke beech apne form mein sudhar kar sakte hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Exam date kab announce hogi?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Exam date abhi schedule ke anusar tay ki jayegi. Official notification mein iske bare mein jaankari di jayegi. Admit card exam se pehle jari kar diye jayenge.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Group D mein kis tarah ki jobs hoti hain?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Group D mein vibhinn supporting roles hote hain jaise office peon, mali, safai karmachari, chowkidar, etc. Yeh sarkari karyalayon mein administrative support ke liye hoti hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya Haryana ke bahar ke log bhi apply kar sakte hain?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, agar aap Haryana ke reserved category mein nahi aate hain, toh anya rajyon ke general category ke candidates bhi 500 rupees fee ke sath apply kar sakte hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mera Graduation complete hai, kya main apply kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, agar aapne graduation complete kar li hai aur aapke paas 10th class ka certificate hai jismein Hindi ya Sanskrit subject tha, toh aap apply kar sakte hain. Age limit criteria bhi poora hona chahiye.

jobs.ai_h1: Indian Air Force Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant Recruitment 2026
jobs.ai_title: IAF Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant Vacancy 2026 Apply Online
jobs.ai_meta_description: Indian Air Force (IAF) invites applications for Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant posts. Last date to apply online is 26/07/2026. Check eligibility and apply now!
jobs.ai_overview: Indian Air Force (IAF) ne Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant ke liye recruitment 2026 ka notification jaari kiya hai. Ye recruitment intake 02/2027 ke liye hai. Iss bharti ke madhyam se Medical Assistant ke post par avsar uplabdh hain. Jo ummeedwar sarkari naukri ki talaash mein hain aur aviation sector mein career banana chahte hain, unke liye ye ek behtareen mauka hai. Application process 06 July 2026 se shuru hogi aur ummeedwar 26 July 2026 tak online apply kar sakte hain. Exam 22-23 September 2026 ko hone ki sambhavna hai. Adhiktam jaankari ke liye, ummeedwaron ko sarkaari notification padhne ki salah di jaati hai. IAF hamesha desh ki seva karne waale yuvaon ka swagat karta hai aur yeh bharti usi disha mein ek kadam hai.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: IAF dwara Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant ke liye nikali gayi yeh bharti yuvaon ko ek shaanadar career banane ka mauka de rahi hai. Medical Assistant ke post ke liye eligibility mein 10+2 science stream ke saath-saath diploma/B.Sc pharmacy ki degree holders bhi apply kar sakte hain, jo ki ek vishal ummeedwaron ko aamantrit karta hai. Age limit mein bhi kuch categories ke liye chhoot di gayi hai, jiska vivaran notification mein mil jayega. Application fee sabhi category ke liye saman rakhi gayi hai jo ki ₹550 hai, aur payment online mode se hoga. Yeh bharti IAF ki medical branch ko mazboot karne mein madad karegi aur desh seva karne ki ichha rakhne wale yuvaon ke liye ek mahatvapurna avsar hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aap 12th pass hain (Physics, Chemistry, Biology aur English ke saath) ya phir pharmacy mein diploma/B.Sc kiye hue hain aur ek pratishthit sanstha mein career banana chahte hain, toh yeh bharti aapke liye hai. Desh ki seva karne ka jazba rakhne wale aur medical field mein apni seva dene ke liye utsuk yuvaon ko is avsar ka laabh uthana chahiye. Agar aapki umar nirdharit seemaon ke andar hai aur aapke paas zaroori educational qualifications hain, toh IAF Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant post ke liye zaroor apply karein.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: IAF Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant ki taiyari ke liye, sabse pehle official syllabus ko acche se samajhein. Exam mein aane wale subjects jaise English, Reasoning, General Awareness aur Medical Assistant trade-specific syllabus par focus karein. Mock tests solve karein taaki time management ka abhyas ho sake. Previous year papers ko dekhne se aapko exam pattern aur important topics ka andaza lagega. Physical fitness par bhi dhyan dena bahut zaroori hai kyunki IAF mein shaarmik pariksha ka bhi mahatva hai. Current affairs aur general knowledge ko regular base par update karte rahein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: IAF Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant post ke liye vatan aur sanman ke saath achha vetan milta hai. Niyukti ke baad, ummeedwaron ko sarkari niyamon ke anusar vetan aur bhatte prapt hote hain. Initial salary aur uske saath milne wale anya bhatton ki adhik jaankari ke liye, kripya IAF dwara jaari ki gayi sarkaari notification ka sandarbh lein. IAF mein seva karte hue career advancement ke saath-saath vetan mein vriddhi ki sambhavnayein bhi hoti hain.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Medical Assistant (Group Y) ke roop mein, aap Indian Air Force ke medical establishments mein healthcare sevaayein pradaan karne ke liye jimmedaar honge. Is bhumika mein, aapko team ke hisse ke roop mein kaam karna hoga, jismein doctoron aur anya medical staff ki madad karna shaamil hai. Aapko basic medical procedures, patient care, davaaon ka prabandhan aur military personnel ke swasthya ki dekhbhaal mein sahayata karni padegi. Ye ek aisi bhumika hai jahan aapko shauch, anushasan aur seva ka ek mishran dekhne ko milega.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: IAF Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant ke liye chunav prakriya mein likhit pariksha (Objective type), Physical Fitness Test (PFT), Medical Examination aur Document Verification shaamil hai. Likhit pariksha mein safal hone ke liye, syllabus ke sabhi bhaagon ka gahrai se adhyayan karein. PFT ke liye apni sharirik kshamata ko behtar banayein. Medical examination mein sabhi swasthya maapdandon ko poora karna anivarya hai. Apne sabhi dastavezon ko tayyar rakhein aur saaf sutre presentation ke saath unhein pesh karein.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Indian Air Force (IAF) mein Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant post ke liye apply karna bahut seedha hai. Sabse pehle, IAF ki official recruitment website par jaayein jiska link aapko niche milega. Wahan, aapko 'Apply Online' ka option dikhai dega. Us par click karein aur sabse pehle apna registration poora karein. Registration ke baad, aapko application form mein apni sabhi zaroori jaankariyan, jaise naam, pitashree ka naam, janm tithi, pata, education details aadi sahi-sahi bharni hogi. Form bharne ke baad, aapko nirdharit application fee ₹550 ka bhugtan online karna hoga. Fee bhugtan ke baad, aapko apne dastavezon ki scan ki hui copy jaise passport size photo aur signature upload karne honge. Saath hi, notification mein diye gaye nirdeshon ke anusar, anya zaroori dastavez bhi upload karne pad sakte hain. Akhir mein, poore bhare hue form ko submit karne se pehle ek baar dhyan se check karein aur uska printout zaroor nikaal lein.
